title: Marriage Therapy | #shorts
full_text: so shell today I'm going to give you a gift I'm going to be your therapist forget I'm your wife I forgot that 10 years ago okay we are not making jokes right now sh whatever is on your heart you say it with no fear I mean it's everything has become so expensive zoa is already in college bridge is going to Cornell this fall two tuition and the third one coming up I mean that's a real source of stress yeah I understand that you just keep making more money and make more than you make right now and that will fix that okay ni next okay um then I also am very stressed out about health or as my wife is growing older she may need more support and even though I don't age as much I age too you do age I mean I have seen signs of you aging your wife looks pretty youthful I see her in the news all the time I feel like you're just creating problems where no problems exist my aging parents of parents are 5,000 m away and I really miss them that sounds like good news right now they want to see me they want to see my children want to spend time with my with their daughter-in-law who doesn't do any daughter-in-law things so I'm going to ask you very clearly I'm all about results in a fight between your mom and your wife whose side do you take my mother
